sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32144" key="e)kkentrepi/kuklos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκεντρεπίκυκλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n32144.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">requiring both eccentric and epicycle,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑπόθεσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
